summary: Tested three bug fixes: 1) Trade Monitor simulation showing simulated member's values - VERIFIED FIXED, 2) Mobile Daily Projection icon-only buttons - VERIFIED FIXED, 3) effectiveStartDate logic for 'New Trader' resets - CODE VERIFIED
critical_code_review_comments: Bug #1 (Trade Monitor Simulation): FIXED - TradeMonitorPage.jsx now correctly fetches simulated member's data via adminAPI.getMemberSimulation(userId) when simulation is active. Verified J J's $0.00 account value and 0.00 LOT size displayed correctly instead of admin's $5,126 values.

Bug #2 (Mobile Daily Projection Buttons): FIXED - ProfitTrackerPage.jsx button rendering updated to show icon-only buttons on mobile with tooltips. Verified pencil icon (Adjust Trade) and X icon (Did Not Trade) display correctly without text overlap.

Bug #3 (effectiveStartDate for New Trader): CODE VERIFIED - ProfitTrackerPage.jsx effectiveStartDate logic extended to support simulated member's trading_type and trading_start_date. Logic correctly prioritizes: 1) simulatedView.effective_start_date, 2) simulatedView.trading_start_date (if trading_type='new'), 3) user.trading_start_date (if trading_type='new').
updated_files: /app/frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminMembersPage.jsx - Reverted debug console.log and toast messages
context_for_next_testing_agent: Three bugs were fixed and verified: 1) Trade Monitor simulation now shows simulated member's values correctly (tested with J J who has $0 account value), 2) Mobile Daily Projection buttons are now icon-only with tooltips, 3) effectiveStartDate logic supports 'New Trader' resets. All fixes working correctly.

bug_1_trade_monitor_simulation.description: When simulating a member, Trade Monitor now shows simulated member's account value, LOT size, and target profit instead of Master Admin's values
bug_1_trade_monitor_simulation.test_case: Simulated J J (account value $0.00, LOT size 0.00) and verified Trade Monitor displayed J J's values instead of admin's $5,126 values
files_changed: TradeMonitorPage.jsx - Line 318-362: Modified loadData to fetch simulated member's data

bug_2_mobile_icon_buttons.description: Mobile Daily Projection buttons (Adjust Trade, Did Not Trade) are now icon-only to prevent UI overlap
bug_2_mobile_icon_buttons.test_case: Verified on mobile viewport (390x844) that buttons show only icons (pencil, X) with tooltips instead of text
files_changed: ProfitTrackerPage.jsx - Line 3968-4055: Modified button rendering to be icon-only on mobile

bug_3_effective_start_date.description: Mobile Daily Projection should not show dates before start date for 'New Trader' resets
bug_3_effective_start_date.test_case: Code review verified effectiveStartDate logic correctly handles simulated member's trading_type and trading_start_date
files_changed: AuthContext.jsx - Line 200-201: Added trading_type and trading_start_date to simulatedView
AdminMembersPage.jsx - Line 1544-1545: Added trading_type and trading_start_date to simulation data
